S

save(GameManager, Path) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.persistence.GameSaver
Serializes and saves the complete game state to a specified file.
saveCurrentGame() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Persists the current game session state and summary to disk.
saveSummary(GameManager, Path) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.persistence.GameSaver
Saves a small plain text summary of the current match state.
SceneManager - Class in com.example.battleship.view
Singleton manager class responsible for controlling window transitions, loading FXML layouts, and applying application-wide styling and window icons in JavaFX.
selectTarget() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.HuntTargetStrategy
Selects the next coordinate to attack based on current state.
selectTarget() - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.IShootingStrategy
Determines and returns the next target coordinate to attack.
setCellState(CellState) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Cell
Sets the state of this cell.
setHumanTurn(boolean) - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Sets turn ownership.
setNickname(String) - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Updates the player's nickname.
setStage(Stage) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.SceneManager
Configures the primary window Stage for scene switching and attaches the default app icon.
Ship - Class in com.example.battleship.model.ships
Abstract base class representing a naval vessel on the game board.
Ship(int, Orientation, List<Cell>) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Ship
Constructs a new Ship with a designated size, orientation, and list of occupied cells.
ShipFactory - Class in com.example.battleship.model
Factory class responsible for instantiating specific Ship implementations.
ShipFactory() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.ShipFactory
 
ShipOverLapException - Exception in com.example.battleship.model.exceptions
Exception thrown when attempting to place a ship on coordinates that overlap with another ship already positioned on the board.
ShipOverLapException(String) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.ShipOverLapException
Constructs a new ShipOverLapException with a descriptive message explaining the placement overlap error.
ShipShapeFactory - Class in com.example.battleship.view.shapes
Factory class responsible for instantiating JavaFX Group vector graphics corresponding to specific ship types and applying spatial orientation transformations.
ShipShapeFactory() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
 
ShipType - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.model.enums
Defines the specific types of ships available in the Battleship game.
ShipView - Class in com.example.battleship.view
JavaFX Group component representing the visual display of a vessel on the game board grid.
ShipView(Ship) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.ShipView
Constructs a ShipView instance for a given model Ship.
shoot(Coordinate) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Board
Executes a shot at a target coordinate and notifies listeners of state updates.
ShootingMode - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.model.enums
Represents the AI player's active shooting strategy mode in Battleship.
ShotMarkView - Class in com.example.battleship.view
Visual shot marker component drawn over an individual board cell using JavaFX Group shapes.
SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.AircraftCarrier
Standard size of an Aircraft Carrier in grid cells.
SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Destroyer
Standard size of a Destroyer in grid cells.
SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Frigate
Standard size of a Frigate in grid cells.
SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Submarine
Standard size of a Submarine in grid cells.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.battleship.Main
 
startNewGame(String) - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Initializes a new match session with the given nickname.
Submarine - Class in com.example.battleship.model.ships
Represents a Submarine ship in Battleship.
Submarine(Orientation, List<Cell>) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Submarine
Constructs a new Submarine with the specified orientation and grid cells.
SUBMARINE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.ShipType
Submarine, which occupies 3 grid cells.
submarineHull() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Gradients
Creates a vertical linear gradient optimized for rounded submarine hulls.
SubmarineShape - Class in com.example.battleship.view.shapes.ships
Utility factory for constructing the graphical 2D JavaFX representation of a Submarine.
sunk() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.ShotMarkView
Creates an intensified visual marker for a cell belonging to a completely destroyed/sunk vessel (a dark red target ring combined with a red diagonal X).
SUNK - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.CellState
Cell belongs to a ship that has been completely destroyed and revealed.
